title: US Strikes Iran As Tensions Escalate Over Shipping Routes In Hormuz
summary_full: The US military announced Thursday that it is conducting the 13th night of strikes against Iran as clashes escalate over shipping routes.
summary_public: The US military announced Thursday that it is conducting the 13th night of strikes against Iran as clashes escalate over shipping routes.
